mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pub_clog ( pk_log, code, name, src_sys, src_id, res_direct, logdate, ip, url, action, sessionid, token, userid, state, response, request, thwmsg, message, restcode, startime, endtime, runtime, datatype, billdate, enable, def01, def02, def03, def04, def05, def06, def07, def08, def09, def10, def11, def12, def13, def14, def15, def16, def17, def18, def19, def20, pk_group, pk_org, pk_org_v, creator, creationtime, modifier, modifiedtime, memo, cookes,referer,localaddr,clientip, tenantid,tenantcode ) VALUES ( #{clog.pkLog}, #{clog.code}, #{clog.name}, #{clog.srcSys}, #{clog.srcId}, #{clog.resDirect}, #{clog.logdate}, #{clog.ip}, #{clog.url}, #{clog.action}, #{clog.sessionid}, #{clog.token}, #{clog.userid}, #{clog.state}, #{clog.response}, #{clog.request}, #{clog.thwmsg}, #{clog.message}, #{clog.restcode}, #{clog.startime}, #{clog.endtime}, #{clog.runtime}, #{clog.datatype}, #{clog.billdate}, #{clog.enable}, #{clog.def01}, #{clog.def02}, #{clog.def03}, #{clog.def04}, #{clog.def05}, #{clog.def06}, #{clog.def07}, #{clog.def08}, #{clog.def09}, #{clog.def10}, #{clog.def11}, #{clog.def12}, #{clog.def13}, #{clog.def14}, #{clog.def15}, #{clog.def16}, #{clog.def17}, #{clog.def18}, #{clog.def19}, #{clog.def20}, #{clog.pkGroup}, #{clog.pkOrg}, #{clog.pkOrgV}, #{clog.creator}, #{clog.creationtime}, #{clog.modifier}, #{clog.modifiedtime},#{clog.memo}, #{clog.cookes}, #{clog.referer}, #{clog.localaddr}, #{clog.clientip}, #{clog.tenantid}, #{clog.tenantcode} )

INSERT INTO pub_clog ( pk_log, code, name, src_sys, src_id, res_direct, logdate, ip, url, action, sessionid, token, userid, state, response, request, thwmsg, message, restcode, startime, endtime, runtime, datatype, billdate, enable, def01, def02, def03, def04, def05, def06, def07, def08, def09, def10, def11, def12, def13, def14, def15, def16, def17, def18, def19, def20, pk_group, pk_org, pk_org_v, creator, creationtime, modifier, modifiedtime, memo, cookes,referer,localaddr,clientip, tenantid,tenantcode ) VALUES ( #{logMap.pk_log}, #{logMap.code}, #{logMap.name}, #{logMap.src_sys}, #{logMap.src_id}, #{logMap.res_direct}, #{logMap.logdate}, #{logMap.ip}, #{logMap.url}, #{logMap.action}, #{logMap.sessionid}, #{logMap.token}, #{logMap.userid}, #{logMap.state}, #{logMap.response}, #{logMap.request}, #{logMap.thwmsg}, #{logMap.message}, #{logMap.restcode}, #{logMap.startime}, #{logMap.endtime}, #{logMap.runtime}, #{logMap.datatype}, #{logMap.billdate}, #{logMap.enable}, #{logMap.def01}, #{logMap.def02}, #{logMap.def03}, #{logMap.def04}, #{logMap.def05}, #{logMap.def06}, #{logMap.def07}, #{logMap.def08}, #{logMap.def09}, #{logMap.def10}, #{logMap.def11}, #{logMap.def12}, #{logMap.def13}, #{logMap.def14}, #{logMap.def15}, #{logMap.def16}, #{logMap.def17}, #{logMap.def18}, #{logMap.def19}, #{logMap.def20}, #{logMap.pk_group}, #{logMap.pk_org}, #{logMap.pk_org_v}, #{logMap.creator}, #{logMap.creationtime}, #{logMap.modifier}, #{logMap.modifiedtime}, #{logMap.memo}, #{logMap.cookes}, #{logMap.referer}, #{logMap.localaddr}, #{logMap.clientip}, #{logMap.tenantid}, #{logMap.tenantcode} )
